name: stack
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins by angryfox

plugins.name: incremental-commit
plugins.description: Break pending git changes into multiple logical atomic commits with Conventional Commit messages, ordered by dependency.

plugins.name: ninja-from-drf
plugins.description: Migrate a Django REST Framework API to django-ninja / django-ninja-extra while preserving routes, schemas, auth, permissions, throttling, pagination, filtering, and tests.
